title: Acctim 71893 Cole Radio Controlled Alarm Clock in Black
features: Radio Controlled (UK & Ireland only) - Tuned to the UK's Atomic Clock transmitter. Featuring fully automatic set-up and adjustment to summer/winter time changes.
Acctim Superbrite White Backlight for Easy Night Time Viewing.
Multi-function LCD Display Showing Time, Calendar & Indoor Temperature.
Dimensions: HWL: 6 x 7.2 x 4cm - 0.10kg. Requires 2x AAA Battery (Not Included)
description: Acctim Radio Controlled clocks are self-setting, receiving absolute Atomic accuracy and adjusting automatically to seasonal time changes. Acctim Superbrite backlights give an all-round brighter and clearer display for easier night time viewing. Perfect for those who need a little help seeing in low-light settings. LCD clocks display the time digitally by using a Liquid Crystal Display, often accompanied by a coloured backlight, powered by batteries.
